content.speakerText: Why did you choose this program at UCLA?
content.speakerTextCn: 你为什么选择加州大学洛杉矶分校的这个项目？
expectedAnswers: I chose UCLA because its Environmental Science department has a strong focus on urban sustainability, and I want to apply that to my hometown's pollution problems.
My undergraduate research on air quality made me realize I needed access to cutting-edge labs and data — UCLA offers exactly that.
I was inspired by Professor Lee’s work on green infrastructure, and I want to learn from her team.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰解释了选择该学校/项目的具体原因
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，是否避免中式英语
表达自然度：是否像母语者一样流畅自然，有真实情感
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'sustainability', 'research', 'apply to', 'cutting-edge' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: What do you plan to do after graduation?
expectedAnswers: I plan to return to China and work in policy advocacy, helping cities adopt the green tech models I learn here.
I have a job offer waiting from my family’s firm — I’ll go back and lead their sustainability division.
After graduation, I’ll stay for six months to intern at a U.S. environmental firm, then return home to apply what I’ve learned.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达回国计划，避免模糊或暗示长期留美
语言准确性：时态使用是否正确（will / plan to），动词搭配是否地道
表达自然度：是否自然融入职业目标与个人背景
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'return to China', 'implement', 'apply', 'family firm', 'sustainability' 等关键词

content.speakerText: How has your past experience influenced your choice of study abroad?
content.speakerTextCn: 你过去的经历如何影响了你选择出国留学？
expectedAnswers: Volunteering at a local clean-up project showed me how little policy enforcement there was — that’s why I want to study environmental policy abroad.
I saw how my city’s waste management failed, and I realized I needed global best practices to fix it — that’s why I’m here.
My internship at a Chinese NGO made me realize we lack data-driven environmental tools — so I chose a program strong in analytics.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否将个人经历与留学动机清晰关联
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的因果表达（because, that’s why, so）
表达自然度：是否避免套话，体现真实故事与情感
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'realized', 'needed', 'best practices', 'data-driven', 'policy enforcement' 等场景关键词
